jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BikeDekho - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
BikeDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BikeDekho:
BikeDekho is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho!
